items.title: Concordant League — Open Division
items.summary: Four-team round-robin: Spoke Watch, Plaza Runners, Verge Trackers, Bazaar Couriers. Currently mid-season, week 3 of 6.

items.title: Dust Bowl — Frontier Division
items.summary: Six-team frontier league: Long Riders, Caravan Guards, Western Watch, Far-Marker, Pell's Scouts, Smithy Wreckers. End-of-season tournament next quarter.
